reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.125 , reason:  [Stack capacity is 100, valid indices are 0-99; condition should be j >= 100 or j == 100, but j represents count/top index incorrectly]

31.reason: [This handles sig == 0, but also any other non-1, non--1 value as pop, which violates spec (only 0 is pop).]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [This handles both pop (sig == 0) and any other non-1, non--1 input as pop, which is wrong. Only sig == 0 should trigger pop. For example, if input is 2, it will incorrectly call pull().]
